lastSession.summary: All 5 tasks complete. 23 tests pass for ConflictPredictor covering validation, severity classification (high/medium/low), regrouping behavior, verdict/summary, and severity precedence. Three tests from the plan required fixes: minimal graphs with transitive overlaps produce medium severity (not low) because the coupling adapter computes coupling for ALL file nodes and shared.ts's fanIn=2 hits the P80 threshold in small graphs. Fixed by adding a triangle cluster of 3 mutually-importing files to push the coupling P80 threshold above shared.ts's value.
